subcodes.first_line: Say: This is not the day of vain hopes; consume them in the fire of Beauty. Thus doth command you the All-Sufficient, the Most Exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لیس الیوم یوم الامال ان احرقوها بنار الجمال کذلک یامرکم الغنی المتعال
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
